key_findings: Found 2 travel_lodging records for E0009 (张婷) within 2025-04-03 to 2025-04-17: R004212 (2025-04-10, 5100 yuan) and R004213 (2025-04-15, 5100 yuan)
Both records share same employee (E0009), same expense type (travel_lodging), same reason ('拆分报销注入样本3'), and fall 5 days apart within the 7-day window
Individual records each at 5100 yuan fall under AR-02 tier (部门经理,并经财务复核), requiring department manager + financial review
Combined amount of 10200 yuan reaches AR-03 tier (>=10000, 部门总经理) — the '较高审批线' — but neither record received AR-03 approval
This is a clear split-reimbursement violation of Article 11 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md
Both records were approved only by E0009 (self-approval as 部门经理) without the required financial review (AR-02 requires 部门经理,并经财务复核)
Each invoice has usage_count=1, confirming no invoice reuse
unresolved_items: AR-02 requires both 部门经理 and 财务复核 approval roles, but both records show only the 部门经理 approval (E0009 self-approving); this missing financial review is noted but outside the strict scope of the Article 11 split-reimbursement analysis
